incorrects.description: Student selected 3, confusing the bar value with the count of intervals or symbols

params.description: Blue bar remains highlighted, axis line at 30 glows.

steps.text: Look where the bar ends. It's not at 3. Find the number on the axis where the top of the bar lines up.

incorrects.description: Student selected 20, reading the wrong axis value

params.description: Horizontal line draws from top of Blue bar to vertical axis at 30.

steps.text: Blue's bar goes higher than 20. Follow the top of the bar to the axis. What number is there?

incorrects.description: Student selected 35, the axis maximum instead of the bar height

params.description: Horizontal line draws from top of Blue bar to vertical axis at 30.

steps.text: 35 is the top of the axis, not where Blue's bar ends. Look at where the bar stops. That's the value.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Horizontal guideline draws from top of Blue bar to axis, landing at 30. Axis label 30 pulses.

steps.text: Let me show you. The top of Blue's bar lines up with the 30 mark on the axis. That's the height of the bar. The bar shows 30.
